title: Unsealed Fate - JJK
description: a jjk modpack centered around the jujutsu kaisen mod by ImNotHuragan; Cursed Fate. Featureing reworked nether end and overworld structres as well as the overall server managing expericnce and other in game features like an enchant rework.
body:
**This is a Modrinth App Instance, download ths file with the app and the instance will automatically download (nothing else needed). i do recomend adding client side mods aswell**

a modpack centered around the jjk (jujutsu kaisen) mod by ImNotHuragan; Cursed Fate. Featureing reworked nether end and overworld structres as well as the overall server managing expericnce and other in game features like an enchant rework.

Cursed fate contains the following cursed techniques and items; a quest board giving an RPG feeling, allowing you to master your abilities and become stronger with them. Inverted spear of heaven; a powerfull sword allowing the user to swing faster, with more damage and with the ability to bypass Infinity.
The Cursed Techniques in the mod currently include: Limitless, Private Pure Love Train, Soul Shrine, Vessel, Shrine, Disaster Flames, Cursed Partners, Boogie Woogie, Puppet Manipulation, Blood Manipulation, Heavenly Restriction, aswell as Star Rage. Cursed Fate also includes 3 structures to loot from.

Other Additions to this modpack include structure mods.
these include; Demis Sky Arena, When Dungeons Arise: Seven Seas,Withering Heights: Revamped Wither, Explorify, Lootr, Mes- Moog's End and Nether Structures, Towns and Towers, True Ending - Ender Dragon Overhaul, Yung's Better Desert Templesm End Island, Mineshafts, and Strongholds. Nothing too overkill to keep the vannila feeling and allowing for a more difficult progression.

Other quality of life mods include Emojis, Infinite Villager trading, item inspecting, item banning, recipie lists, gravestones, Villager in a bucket allowing easy villager transport, teams, voice chat, players dropping their heads, aswell as a great anti cheat. (more info / config on it join Noahs Discord: https://discord.gg/YvSuUXhmKz )

Client side mods will be added soon!
